subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。右手のそれぞれの指にかかっている糸を向こう側に1回転ねじります
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Opening A". Twist all the right-hand finger strings once away from you.

subtitle.ja: 左手のそれぞれの指にかかっている糸を向こう側に1回転ねじります
subtitle.en: Twist all the left-hand finger strings once away from you.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で人差し指手前の糸を押し下げ、小指手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, press down the near index-finger strings and pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指の糸を外します
左右の小指で、人差し指の糸の下を通って親指向こうの2本の糸を上から握ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, move under the index-finger strings and grasp down over the two far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over and pick down the near index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左手親指の上にかかっている、親指と人差し指を繋ぐ1本の糸を残したまま、下の2本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: On the left thumb, keeping the single string that runs between thumb and index finger, release only the two lower strings.

subtitle.ja: 右手親指の上にかかっている、親指と人差し指を繋ぐ1本の糸を残したまま、下の2本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: On the right thumb, keeping the single string that runs between thumb and index finger, release only the two lower strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指と親指の指先を合わせ、人差し指の糸を親指に移します
subtitle.en: Bring the tips of both index fingers and thumbs together, and transfer the index-finger strings to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、親指向こうの2本の糸を下からとり、親指の糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up from below the two far thumb strings, release the thumb strings, and show the finished figure.
